title: 06534_Using_Large_Language_Models_to_Simulate_Multiple_Humans_and_Replicate_Human_Subject_Studies
positive_examples: TEs may inform the design of costly experiments, potentially leading to more efficient research methodologies.
TEs provide insight into human behaviors captured in AI systems, which can improve the understanding of AI's capabilities.
negative_examples: Unrealistic models of human numerical knowledge and accuracy may lead to misinterpretations of AI capabilities.
Ethical considerations, limitations, and risks associated with TEs are discussed, indicating potential negative implications.
